---
title: "About"
---

# About the Author

My name is **Jack Li**, and I am an undergraduate student at the **University of Toronto** pursuing an Honours Bachelor of Science. I am specializing in **Data Science**, with a focus on quantitative finance, and **Mathematical Applications in Economics and Finance**.

My academic interests include **data analysis**, **machine learning**, **statistical modeling**, **financial economics**, and **mathematical finance**. I have worked with tools such as **Python**, **R**, **SQL**, **Pandas**, **NumPy**, **Scikit-learn**, **SciPy**, **Matplotlib**, **Tableau**, and **Git**.

# Project Context

This website was created for the **JSC370 Final Project**. The project examines whether macro-financial indicators can meaningfully predict future **S&P 500 returns** using regression and classification models.

# Links

- [Home](index.html)
- [Final Report](report.html)
- [Interactive Visualizations](interactive-viz.html)
- [Download the PDF Report](report.pdf)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/lijack032/JSC370-Project)
